title: Archivist Identity Key ID Mismatch + Cross-Lane Sync Gate
description: Archivist .trust/keys.json has key_id 1a7741b8d353abee but .identity/snapshot.json has key_id d5faddfa2ab2ff3f. Additionally, Archivist is implementing a cross-lane sync gate that enforces convergence before cross-lane writes.
impact: Integration tests fail; cross-lane trust verification cannot complete; sync gate implementation pending
required_action: 1. Archivist must resolve key_id mismatch (regenerate snapshot OR rotate trust store key). 2. Implement cross-lane sync gate. 3. User must authorize key rotation decision and review sync gate design.
resolution: Option A (DER fingerprint standard) implemented across all 3 RSA lanes. All trust stores updated with correct DER key_ids. Recovery tests 11/11 PASS.
user_action_required: Authorize key rotation: Option A (regenerate snapshot) OR Option B (rotate trust store)
Review sync gate design before implementation

library_resolution.fix: Fixed swarmmind_no_identity false positive - SwarmMind uses HMAC-SHA256, not RSA public.pem. Added laneHasIdentity() helper to post-compact-audit.js.
